title: Public Safety & Quality of Life
summary: Helping downtown feel safer, quieter, better lit, and easier to enjoy at different times of day.
notes: Street lighting, crossings, sound, walking, and public spaces.

title: Housing & Development
summary: New homes, new buildings, and planning conversations that shape how downtown grows.
notes: Residential development, affordable housing, mixed-use projects, and development proposals.

title: Parks & Public Spaces
summary: Parks, trails, trees, plazas, and open spaces where people actually want to spend time.
notes: Waterloo Greenway, Shoal Creek, Republic Square, public plazas, and street trees.

title: I-35
summary: Construction, traffic changes, air quality, and how the reconstruction may affect downtown residents.
notes: Highway changes near downtown and the long effort to reconnect the city.

title: Project Connect
summary: Austin's future transit network, including downtown station planning, timelines, and resident impact.
notes: Light rail planning, station locations, timelines, and downtown connections.

title: Downtown's Future
summary: The mix of homes, local businesses, walkable streets, public life, and community events that make downtown feel like a neighborhood.
notes: Housing, public spaces, walkability, street life, and local businesses.
